title: Inventory V2 Replenishment Rule Upsert Request
description: Payload for creating or updating a min/max replenishment rule (POST = create, PUT = update).

productId.description: ID of the product this rule applies to.

warehouseId.description: ID of the warehouse this rule applies to.

minQty.description: Minimum stock threshold below which replenishment is triggered.

maxQty.description: Maximum stock target. Suggested order quantity = maxQty - availableQty.
